title: Implement 039-plan-quality-gates
description:
Implement the approved plan by working through beads.

**Bead cycle:**
1. `mindspec next --spec=039-plan-quality-gates` — claim next ready bead
2. Write code, tests, docs in the worktree
3. `mindspec complete --spec=039-plan-quality-gates` — close bead, advance state

Repeat until all beads are closed. `mindspec complete` transitions to review
mode when the last bead is done.

Run `mindspec instruct --spec=039-plan-quality-gates` for implementation guidance.
close_reason: All 039-A through 039-F beads implemented and verified. make test passes, dogfood validation passes.

description:
Human review gate: approve the implementation plan.

```bash
mindspec approve plan 041-explore-mode
```

This validates the plan, updates frontmatter to Approved, creates
implementation beads, writes bead IDs back into plan.md, and resolves the
plan gate.

**After approval:** run `mindspec next --spec=041-explore-mode` to claim the first
bead and enter implementation mode.
close_reason: Already implemented in commit e677c6e

title: [SPEC 044-launch-website] Launch Website
description:
MindSpec spec lifecycle: spec → approve → plan → approve → implement → review.

This formula tracks the full lifecycle of a single specification from drafting
through implementation and final review. Human gates ensure quality checkpoints
between phases.

## Usage

Create a molecule for a new spec:
```bash
bd mol wisp create spec-lifecycle --var spec_id=039-my-feature
```

Or for an existing spec that's already in progress:
```bash
bd mol wisp create spec-lifecycle --var spec_id=038-beads-native-multi-spec-state
```

## Artifacts Produced

Each phase creates or updates files under `.mindspec/docs/specs/044-launch-website/`:
- `spec.md` — the specification (Phase 1)
- `context-pack.md` — generated context bundle (Phase 2, on approval)
- `plan.md` — the implementation plan (Phase 3)
- `proofs/` — optional proof outputs (Phase 5)

title: Implement 041-explore-mode
description:
Implement the approved plan by working through beads.

**Bead cycle:**
1. `mindspec next --spec=041-explore-mode` — claim next ready bead
2. Write code, tests, docs in the worktree
3. `mindspec complete --spec=041-explore-mode` — close bead, advance state

Repeat until all beads are closed. `mindspec complete` transitions to review
mode when the last bead is done.

Run `mindspec instruct --spec=041-explore-mode` for implementation guidance.
close_reason: Already implemented in commit e677c6e

title: Review 044-launch-website
description:

title: [SPEC 039-plan-quality-gates] Plan Quality Gates
description:
MindSpec spec lifecycle: spec → approve → plan → approve → implement → review.

This formula tracks the full lifecycle of a single specification from drafting
through implementation and final review. Human gates ensure quality checkpoints
between phases.

## Usage

Create a molecule for a new spec:
```bash
bd mol wisp create spec-lifecycle --var spec_id=039-my-feature
```

Or for an existing spec that's already in progress:
```bash

```

Each phase creates or updates files under `.mindspec/docs/specs/039-plan-quality-gates/`:
- `spec.md` — the specification (Phase 1)
- `context-pack.md` — generated context bundle (Phase 2, on approval)
- `plan.md` — the implementation plan (Phase 3)
- `proofs/` — optional proof outputs (Phase 5)
